name: Kunwu Jiuding Investment Holdings Co., Ltd.
summary: Kunwu Jiuding Investment Holdings Co., Ltd. engages in the private equity investment management business in China. The company was formerly known as Jiangxi Zhongjiang Real Estate Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Kunwu Jiuding Investment Holdings Co., Ltd. in December 2015. The company is based in Nanchang, China.
